title: NCI GDC TCGA-GBM
human_summary: Core GBM tumor-genomics program with somatic variants, copy-number, expression, methylation, and linked clinical metadata; open and controlled-access layers.
note: Useful as a baseline molecular reference set and for cohort-level biomarker comparisons.

title: NCI GDC TCGA Pan-Glioma Cohorts
human_summary: Combined glioma genomics across lower-grade glioma and GBM for broader IDH, MGMT, and progression-context comparisons.
note: Helpful when a question needs GBM versus broader diffuse-glioma context.

title: Ivy Glioblastoma Atlas Project
human_summary: Region-resolved glioblastoma atlas with anatomic and molecular context across tumor subregions.
note: Useful for spatial biology and tumor-microenvironment interpretation.

title: cBioPortal GBM Studies
human_summary: Searchable GBM and glioma genomics knowledgebase spanning TCGA and many published studies with mutation, CNA, and outcome views.
note: Useful for rapid cross-study biomarker lookups and recurrence of alterations.

title: CPTAC Brain / Glioblastoma Proteogenomic Resources
human_summary: Proteomic and proteogenomic tumor data relevant to GBM biology and pathway activation beyond DNA-only signals.
note: Useful when DNA findings need protein-level context.
